name: token-optimizer-mcp
description: An MCP server for running workspace tests and triaging failures using Token Optimizer.

scripts.test:security: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node scripts/run-tests.js test/security/command-boundary.test.js test/security/inference-boundary.test.js test/security/installer-boundary.test.js test/security/gateway-boundary.test.js test/installer/credential-store.test.js test/installer/repair.test.js test/installer/uninstall.test.js test/scripts/package-hygiene.test.js test/scripts/release-versions.test.js
scripts.build:plugin: npm run build:plugin:antigravity && npm run build:plugin:claude && npm run build:plugin:codex && npm run build:plugin:opencode && npm run build:plugin:cursor
scripts.build:installer: npm run build && npm run build:plugin && node scripts/build-installer-package.js
